name: Gram (prev. Toncoin)
analysis: GRAM's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 14% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.1× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry $1.5665, stop $1.5083, target $1.7432 (3.04:1) — then trail it.
